description: Cruise Critic is a cruise travel site that publishes cruise reviews, cruise news, destination guides, deals, and community forums. It helps travelers research cruises, ships, itineraries, and shore excursions.
summary: Cruise Critic exposes a public MCP server at https://chatgpt.cruisecritic.com/mcp; no public developer REST, GraphQL, or CLI surface was found on cruisecritic.com.
